CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-25-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-26-2023 Off Calendar

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Jan-04-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ross McKissick, Esq. 415-495-0440 Harris Personal Injury Lawyers for Plaintiff.
Heidi Adams, Esq. (415) 273-6500 Armijo Morovati & Shields for Defendant.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court announces it has been informed the case has settled on 12/22/22 on a contest email. Mr. McKissick apologizes for not informing the Court sooner. Ms. Adams apprises the Court they are waiting for the releae to be signed. Mr. McKissick will file a dismissal in less than a month. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT TRADER JOE'S COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.

Off-calendar as moot due to the settlement. Plaintiff's counsel to file a dismissal.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
